mapper.sql: a.id, a.student_id, a.alert_type, a.alert_level, a.source_id, a.title, a.content, a.alert_status, a.handler_id, a.handler_name, a.handle_time, a.handle_remark, a.deleted, a.create_time, a.update_time, sp.student_no, sp.chinese_name, sp.english_name
FROM teaching_academic_alert a INNER JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=a.student_id AND sp.deleted=0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teaching_academic_alert (student_id, alert_type, alert_level, source_id, title, content, alert_status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{alertType}, #{alertLevel}, #{sourceId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{alertStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE teaching_academic_alert SET alert_status=#{alertStatus}, handler_id=#{handlerId}, handler_name=#{handlerName}, handle_time=#{handleTime}, handle_remark=#{handleRemark}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}
SELECT WHERE a.student_id=#{studentId} AND a.deleted=0 ORDER BY a.create_time DESC, a.id DESC
